raw.population: No demographics: Based on literature information
raw.objective: “to use pharmacokinetic modelling to provide insight into differences in plasma levels of CBZ and MHD under conditions of steady state and missed or delayed doses”
raw.observations: Simulations were used to show the clinical impact of missed and delayed doses of OXC. Delaying a dose has moderate impact. Missing a dose can cut MHD concentrations in half, which could easily result in break-through seizures. The lack of covariates, other than weight on Vd, means that the model is not very practical for clinical use.
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

extraction_target.title: Carbamazepine extended-release capsules vs. oxcarbazepine: computer simulations of the effect of missed doses on drug plasma concentrations.
extraction_target.population: No demographics: Based on literature information

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.population: No demographics: Based on literature information
study.objective: “to use pharmacokinetic modelling to provide insight into differences in plasma levels of CBZ and MHD under conditions of steady state and missed or delayed doses”

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
